query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A close-up diagonal view of an automobile door panel showing a chrome exterior door handle and adjacent curved bodywork, depicted with smooth sweeping gradients of yellow, lime green, purple, orange, and red flowing across the metallic surfaces.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up diagonal view of an automobile door panel and chrome exterior door handle, aggressively transformed by false-color processing into an abstract composition of clashing neon fields—lime green, purple, orange, and red—where fine surface textures dissolve into flowing color bands and representational clarity is subordinated to turbulent formal qualities.
